description: Source code for AssetService class implementing asset management operations (add, edit, copy, delete, list, get by id, prepare copy) in a .NET application, including dependency injection, logging, validation, and repository interactions.

classes.name: AssetService
classes.description: Implements IAssetService; handles asset operations including add, edit, copy, delete, list, get by id, and prepare copy, with logging, validation, and repository interactions.

methods.name: ManageAsync
methods.description: Handles add/edit/copy/delete operations for assets, including validation, persistence, lineage capture, and replication orchestration.

methods.name: ListAsync
methods.description: Retrieves list of assets for a site, with optional search and includeDeleted flag.

methods.name: GetByIdAsync
methods.description: Retrieves a specific asset by siteId and assetId, throws conflict if not found.

methods.name: RemoveAsync
methods.description: Deletes an asset (soft or hard delete) after validation and confirmation.

methods.name: PrepareCopyAsync
methods.description: Prepares data for copying an asset, including fetching source asset and deriving status date.

methods.name: GetCorrelationId
methods.description: Retrieves correlation ID from HTTP context items.
